name: Chicken Vegetable Casserole
recipeIngredient: 6 (4 oz) Boned, Skinned Chicken Breast Halves
1 lb Unpeeled Red Potatoes, Cut Into 1/8 in. Thick Slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange chicken on a microwave-safe platter with the thickest portions outside.
2. Cover with wax paper and microwave at high for 8 to 9 minutes, turning breasts over and rotating the dish every 3 minutes.
3. Let cool. Cut chicken into bite-size pieces.
4. In a 2-quart casserole, combine carrots and 2 tablespoons water. Cover with plastic wrap and vent.
5. Microwave at high for 2 minutes. Add potatoes; cover and microwave at high for 6 to 8 minutes.
6. In a 2-cup glass measure, mix flour and 2 tablespoons milk. Microwave at high for 2 to 3 minutes, stirring every minute.
7. Add cheese, sage, poultry seasoning, and salt. Stir until cheese melts.
8. Place half of the chicken pieces in the casserole, layer with half of the potato mixture.
9. Sprinkle with half of the peas and top with half of the cheese mixture, spreading evenly.
10. Repeat layers and cover with plastic wrap. Vent.
11. Microwave at high for 6 to 7 minutes; rotate dish a half turn after 3 minutes.
12. Let stand covered for 10 minutes before serving.
